description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a smooth, solid light gray fabric. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and neatly fitted. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, geometric profile. The legs are short, slender, and metallic with a slight outward angle, providing a subtle contrast to the soft upholstery. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, maintaining the overall streamlined appearance. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and slim metallic legs. Its minimalist design and solid upholstery make it suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's inviting seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the thickness of the seat and back cushions, and the slim metallic legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion profile, with a clear view of the sofa's depth and leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all rectangular and fitted; cushions appear attached and not loose.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a minimalist, padded design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, slender legs with a metallic finish, positioned at the corners and slightly angled outward; legs are exposed and provide a modern touch.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two uniform, rectangular cushions; continuous and unsegmented with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
